Goal Setting Fundamentals
Terminology
Critical Number:
EFT’s (where you currently stand).
Freedom Number:
Number of EFT’s needed to be financially free.
1 Year Targets:
Long-term goals (1-3 years).
Quarterly Targets:
3-5 items that if done provide clearest and most direct path to yearly
intention. These typically take an entire quarter or 3-4 months to
accomplish.
30 Day Targets:
30-day goals that indicate you are on track to hit your 3-4 month
targets.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 1 --
